summary: Claude Code reviewed the P2-8 working-tree diffs, implementation paths, tests, docs, and safety boundaries. The changes satisfy issue #11 acceptance criteria: stable additive profile error-code vocabulary is documented, runner/discovery JSON payloads preserve existing errors/warnings while adding deterministic codes/details, representative tests cover requested failure classes, and the implementation remains offline/read-only with no module/scanner/network execution added.

important_issues.issue: Untracked CVE brief artifacts are present but outside P2-8 scope.
important_issues.details: Keep cve_brief_20260516.json and cve_brief_20260516.md out of the P2-8 commit or handle them in a separate explicitly authorized task.

minor_issues.issue: Profile error-code constants are duplicated between module_runner.py and validate_module_profile.py.
minor_issues.details: Acceptable for P2-8; a future shared constants module could reduce drift.

minor_issues.issue: Not every non-profile failure has a machine-readable code.
minor_issues.details: Intentional and compatible with P2-8 scope, which is profile loader/selector error codes.

safety_assessment.summary: No blocking safety boundary concerns found.
details: module_runner.py and validate_module_profile.py remain JSON/file validation and plan-preview code only.

No module code execution, scanner execution, subprocess launch for module behavior, network clients, callbacks, fuzzing, brute force, credential handling, loot handling, target touching, config/scope.txt edits, scheduler/deployment/billing/production setting changes, or generated report changes were introduced in the listed files.
The runner still emits planned dry-run run/1.0 previews only and keeps execution.target_touching false in generated plans.
Profile/schema violations continue to fail closed.
Discovery non-member exclusions are structured warnings; empty selection is a structured hard denial.
validation_performed: Inspected git diff for listed P2-8 files
Ran python -m unittest scripts.test_module_runner scripts.test_module_profile_schema -v: 31 tests OK
Searched changed runner/profile validator area for subprocess/network-client indicators; no new execution/network primitives were found in P2-8 implementation paths

recommended_followups: Keep cve_brief_20260516.json and cve_brief_20260516.md out of the P2-8 commit unless a separate task explicitly includes them.
Consider moving profile error-code constants and issue-detail shape into a small shared module if future validators/runners need the same vocabulary.
In a future non-blocking test pass, add direct assertions for full error_details/warning_details object shape.
